name: aurora-ai-plan
title: Aurora AI Plan
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native plan parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI Plan.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-thinking`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/plan.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-thinking`, `aurora-components`.
